additional_rules.name: jvm-only-lib-in-commonmain
additional_rules.message: JVM-only library imported in commonMain — this will fail to compile on iOS/JS/Wasm targets
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace Gson/Jackson with kotlinx.serialization. Replace Hilt with Koin. Replace Room with SQLDelight. These alternatives work across all Kotlin targets.

additional_rules.name: android-import-in-commonmain
additional_rules.message: Android SDK import in commonMain — move this code to androidMain or use expect/actual abstraction
additional_rules.fix_hint: If this is platform-specific behavior, use expect/actual: define expect fun in commonMain and actual fun in androidMain. If the API has a cross-platform alternative, prefer that instead.

additional_rules.name: dispatchers-main-in-commonmain
additional_rules.message: Dispatchers.Main used in commonMain — inject CoroutineDispatcher as a parameter for platform-independence and testability
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add a CoroutineDispatcher constructor parameter (default to Dispatchers.Default). Callers on each platform inject the appropriate main dispatcher. Use UnconfinedTestDispatcher in tests.

additional_rules.name: expect-actual-overuse
additional_rules.message: New expect declaration — verify that an interface + DI approach would not be simpler and more testable
additional_rules.fix_hint: Consider defining an interface in commonMain and injecting platform implementations via Koin. Reserve expect/actual for truly platform-primitive operations (logging, crypto, file I/O).

additional_rules.name: rxjava-in-commonmain
additional_rules.message: RxJava import in commonMain — RxJava is JVM-only; use kotlinx.coroutines Flow instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace Observable/Single/Completable with Flow/suspend fun. Replace RxJava operators with Flow operators (map, filter, flatMap, etc.).

additional_rules.name: java-util-in-commonmain
additional_rules.message: java.util collection type in commonMain — use Kotlin stdlib collection types instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace java.util.ArrayList with MutableList / mutableListOf(). Replace java.util.HashMap with MutableMap / mutableMapOf(). Kotlin stdlib collections compile on all platforms.
